purpose: Single manifest for turning a story pack into story reader, quiz, storybook, drawing book, booklet PDF, board game, competition, and community unlocks.
qualityRules: Do not show internal production language on public pages.
Do not show rough placeholder diagrams as final coloring pages.
Every drawing book page must have reference art, final line-art asset, brief, and activity.
Every story must connect to at least one deity/place/text/source node.
Every quiz must declare topic tags for filtering and unlock behavior.
Every PDF-oriented page must work through browser print/save-as-PDF.
